fields.label: HTML body
fields.rationale: When 1, the body field is response_html (HTML with Jinja) and email_signature / email_footer from the sending EmailAccount are auto-injected. When 0, the body field is response (rich text editor). Default 1 for transactional email; set 0 only for plain-text workflows.

fields.label: Response body (when use_html=0)
fields.rationale: Rich-text Jinja body. Required when use_html=0. Reference doc fields via {{ doc.fieldname }}. Only the `doc` context is passed to Jinja - NO frappe.session, NO arbitrary frappe.* calls. Use frappe.utils.get_url() via a pre-computed variable if needed.

fields.label: Response body HTML (when use_html=1)
fields.rationale: HTML Jinja body. Required when use_html=1. Same `doc`-only Jinja context as response. validate_template checks syntax at save. Email signature and footer from the EmailAccount are auto-injected at send time.

fields.label: Reference DocType (for Jinja tooling)
fields.rationale: Optional but strongly recommended. When set, Desk's Jinja editor offers autocomplete for fields on this DocType when editing subject / response. It also scopes the template to that DocType for discoverability in the Notification / Email Template picker. Empty means the template is generic. The template still renders correctly at send time regardless, but downstream users have to remember which DocType's fields to reference.
